title: Steven Kean
compiled_truth: Steven Kean is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-24), Steven Kean sent 2558 and received 3627 emails, totalling 6185 interactions. Top correspondents: [Maureen Mcvicker](people/maureen-mcvicker) (427), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (257), [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (175), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (164), [Linda Robertson](people/linda-robertson) (131). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, archiving, california, deleted_items, inbox, sent.
